author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Ship DeepSource, DeepScan, and Scrutinizer CI free-OSS analyzer configurations with documented activation

.deepsource.toml (javascript analyzer + secrets analyzer, exclude/test patterns) committed and valid; .deepscan.json exclusions committed for the ALREADY-ACTIVE DeepScan app (verified passing check on PR#564); .scrutinizer.yml committed; web-UI activation steps for DeepSource (app.deepsource.com) and Scrutinizer (scrutinizer-ci.com) documented on this item for the maintainer — both are free for open-source repos; once activated their checks report on PRs

message: Maintainer directive 2026-07-14: fully set up DeepSource + DeepScan + Scrutinizer CI using free open-source tiers. Live state: DeepScan GitHub app ALREADY installed and reporting (passing check on PR#564, project 30234/32092) — only exclusion config missing; DeepSource and Scrutinizer have no repo presence — config files can ship now, account/app activation is human-gated web UI. Parent pm-92if because this extends the external code-quality analyzer surface (CodeFactor/DeepScan/Hound) it anchors; DeepSource secrets analyzer relates to pm-4ris CI secret scanning.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation: .deepsource.toml (javascript analyzer environment=nodejs + secrets analyzer; exclude dist/coverage/.agents/.tmp/docs-examples; test_patterns tests/benchmarks/spec/bench), .deepscan.json exclusions (DeepScan app already active — team 30234 / project 32092 / branch 1043829, badge added to README), .scrutinizer.yml (javascript checks, node v22, js-scrutinizer-run analysis node). ACTIVATION (maintainer, both free for OSS): DeepSource → app.deepsource.com, sign in with GitHub, activate unbraind/pm-cli (Starter plan, free for open source) — config auto-detected; Scrutinizer → scrutinizer-ci.com, add unbraind/pm-cli as Open Source (free) — .scrutinizer.yml auto-detected. Badges for these two can follow activation.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Activation reconcile: maintainer activated BOTH services 2026-07-14. DeepSource fully green on main d062b573 — three analyzers reporting commit statuses (JavaScript, Secrets, and auto-added Shell), 'Analysis passed: no blocking issues'. Scrutinizer connected but first inspection ERRORED (analysis + tests both): the effective config via the public API is the add-repo wizard preset, not the repo .scrutinizer.yml — it defines a bare 'tests: true' node and inferred npm dependency install, which cannot work on Scrutinizer's build image for a pnpm/Node>=22.18 repo. Fix pushed: repo config made self-sufficient — analysis node skips dependency install ('true' no-op override) and runs js-scrutinizer-run only; wizard's tests node stubbed to a green no-op (real tests live in GitHub Actions). Scrutinizer quality badge added to README. Maintainer follow-up (optional cleanup): clear the dashboard Settings→Configuration field so .scrutinizer.yml is the single source of truth, then the tests-node stub can be dropped. DeepSource badge needs the dashboard badge token (Settings→Badges) — grab it there if wanted in README.
